title: Syncore
description:
Tries to give all resources missing items and blocks, unless not possible. Some examples are copper nuggets or raw diamonds.
This mod is more meant to be used by other mods as a dependency, but you can use it standalone if you want.
body:
Syncore

Syncore is a mod that tries to give all resources missing items and blocks, unless not possible.

The resources currently added to are Charcoal, Coal, Copper, Diamond, Emerald, Iron, Lapis Lazuli, Netherite, Quartz, Resin, and Redstone.

This mod is more meant to be used by other mods as a dependency, but you can use it standalone if you want.

### 1.21.5 Support: 1. [More ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/rayvaxmodmore_ores) 2. [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite)
Suggestions can be made on the github repository, through the issues link.
